zh.of Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusett: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛
zh.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Pine於大約1708年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛時，她的父親Charles Pine37歲，母親Grace Balster33歲。她於1727年與John Reynolds在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1745年之後在美國緬因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Pine于大约1708年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛时，她的父亲Charles Pine37岁，母亲Grace Balster33岁。她于1727年与John Reynolds在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1745年之后在美国缅因州波藍德斯卡波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Pine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pin(e) (Old English pīn, Old French pin), a topographic name for someone who lived by a conspicuous pine tree or in a pine forest; in some cases it may originally have been a nickname for a tall man, one thought to resemble a pine tree.
English: nickname from Middle English pine ‘pain, injury, torture, punishment, infirmity’, referring to someone who suffered from an inflicted pain or punishment.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Le Pin in Calvados or some other French place called from a prominent pine.

variants.name: Pyne
meanings: English: variant of   Pine  . This name has been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Peine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hermann, Markus.
German: habitational name from Peine near Hanover.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Pine was born about 1708, in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Charles Pine, was 37 and her mother, Grace Balster, was 33. She married John Reynolds in 1727, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 1745, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, United States.

Elle a épousé John Reynolds en 1727, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 1745, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Pineが約1708年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアスカーボロウで生まれた時，父Charles Pineは37歳，母Grace Balsterは33歳であった。1727年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウでJohn Reynoldsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1745年以後にアメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドスカーボロウで死去した。

ko.of Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusett: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Pine(이)가 대략 1708년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles Pine(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace Balster(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1727년 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 John Reynolds(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1745년 이후 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Reynolds em 1727, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1745, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.of Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusett: скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Pine родилась около 1708 г. в местности скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Charles Pine было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Grace Balster, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Reynolds в 1727 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 1745 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.
